summary: Verified PhysioSchedule Calendar shows ALL 8 therapists for both admin (26754) and therapist (19352) users. Filter dropdown lists 'All therapists' + all 8 names; single-therapist filter narrows correctly; switching back to 'All therapists' restores all 8 columns. Dashboard shows 'ACTIVE THERAPISTS 8/8'.

issues: Non-blocking React SSR hydration mismatch warning on __root__ (data-tsd-source line-number attr differs between server and client). Tree re-renders on client so functionality is unaffected, but the console error is noisy. Likely caused by Tailwind/TSD source-map plugin injecting different line numbers between SSR and client render.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate root-layout hydration mismatch (data-tsd-source attributes on <html>/<head>/<body> in __root.tsx around line 99-105). Consider disabling the tsd-source-attr plugin for the root layout or ensure it runs identically on server and client to remove the console error.
critical_code_review_comments: Login flow requires ~5-8s wait for supabase auth + user_roles + therapists/appointments/patients fetches before redirect completes. Consider showing a loading spinner on the submit button while auth is in-flight (currently the form appears idle).
SSR hydration mismatch on RootShell is a real code smell even if visually harmless; will surface as a red console error for every user on every page load.
test_credentials: Admin 26754 / Hemas@123, Therapist 19352 / Hemas@123 (both work against remote Supabase).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is Vite + TanStack Start + Supabase (no local FastAPI/Mongo). Login form at /auth uses #emp and #password, submit is button[type=submit]. Auth call goes to https://gqfiumavcxiuonwgjxyj.supabase.co/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password. After successful login the app redirects to '/'. Calendar at /calendar; the Radix Select trigger is [role=combobox]. Therapist column headers are plain text like 'Ms Madhuwanthi'. Wait ~5s after clicking submit and ~5s on /calendar for data to load. Root-layout hydration mismatch console error is present but non-blocking.
